textPreview: Verdict: changes_requested Blocking issues: - Decision 1 (Semantic Colors) is dramatically underscoped — the plan says "swap 6 CSS vars" but the actual work involves 24 new CSS tokens (base/bg/border × 4 categories for light and dark), rewriting all 9 Badge CVA variants which use foreground/alpha patterns not color tokens, updating Button (danger/success variants), Toast, and Input components, and…
